typePrompt: Create one original Wall Sconce. The product must function as a wall-mounted lighting fixture for corridors, bedrooms, living rooms, bedside areas, reading corners, tea rooms, villas, and boutique hospitality spaces. Emphasize wall-mounted structure, compact depth, beautiful side profile, decorative yet functional presence, soft wall grazing light, elegant mounting plate, stable construction, easy installation, strong silhouette from front and side, and human-scale visual comfort. The wall sconce should feel sculptural but practical. Avoid excessive projection from the wall.
